review_settings.notes: Do not make optimisation decisions until an ad has met ALL minimum thresholds. Premature kills waste budget on learning phase.

carisma_spa.notes: CPL kill threshold is 2x the target. CTR below 1% signals weak creative or wrong audience.

carisma_aesthetics.notes: Aesthetics has higher CPL due to higher intent required. CTR threshold slightly lower due to niche audience.

winner_criteria.description: An ad or ad set is classified as a WINNER when ALL of the following conditions are met.

cpl_below_target.description: Cost per lead is at or below the brand's CPL target

minimum_leads.description: Ad has generated a minimum number of leads to be statistically meaningful

minimum_spend_eur.description: Ad has spent enough to be past the learning phase

winner_criteria.action: Scale budget by 20-30%. Duplicate to new audiences. Create variations of the winning hook.

loser_criteria.description: An ad or ad set is classified as a LOSER when ALL of the following conditions are met.

cpl_above_kill_threshold.description: Cost per lead exceeds the brand's kill threshold (2x CPL target)

minimum_spend_eur.description: Ad has spent enough to be fairly evaluated

leads_below_minimum.description: Ad has generated fewer leads than the minimum threshold despite sufficient spend

loser_criteria.action: Pause the ad immediately. Analyse why it failed (hook, targeting, offer, or landing page). Document learnings.

watchlist_criteria.description: Ads that don't clearly qualify as winner or loser. Keep running but monitor closely at next review.
watchlist_criteria.action: Continue running. Review at next scheduled review cycle. Consider minor adjustments (audience, bid, creative refresh).

alert_thresholds.description: Trigger an alert notification when any of these thresholds are breached within a single day.

_metadata.notes: Thresholds should be reviewed and adjusted monthly based on historical performance data.
